decoder.name: cylance-protect-fields
decoder.regex: Event Type: (\.*), Event Name: (\.*), Device Name: (\.*), IP Address: \((\.*)\), File Name: (\.*), Path: (\.*), Drive Type: (\.*), File Owner: (\.*), SHA256: (\.*), MD5: (\.*), Status: (\.*), Cylance Score: (\.*), Found Date: (\.*), File Type: (\.*), Is Running: (\.*), Auto Run: (\.*), Detected By: (\.*), Zone Names: \((\.*)\), Is Malware: (\.*), Is Unique To Cylance: (\.*), Threat Classification: (\.*), Device Id: (\.*), Policy Name: (\.*)

decoder.name: cylance-protect-fields
decoder.regex: Event Type: (\.*), Event Name: (\.*), Device Name: (\.*), IP Address: \((\.*)\), File Name: (\.*), Path: (\.*), Drive Type: (\.*), SHA256: (\.*), MD5: (\.*), Status: (\.*), Cylance Score: (\.*), Found Date: (\.*), File Type: (\.*), Is Running: (\.*), Auto Run: (\.*), Detected By: (\.*), Zone Names: \((\.*)\), Is Malware: (\.*), Is Unique To Cylance: (\.*), Threat Classification: (\.*), Device Id: (\.*), Policy Name: (\.*)
